documents.semantic_id: Design: Jwts Issued By The Old Service Had 1H Expiry; The New Service Defaults To 15M And Nothing Renewed

sections.text:
## Overview
WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.

## Architecture
Rate-limit the /auth/otp endpoint to 5 requests per minute per email; currently it's unbounded. OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong. Refresh token rotation broke after the move to Keycloak 24 — tokens issued before the upgrade are being rejected.

## Data model
Audit log entries for failed MFA challenges are missing the user_agent field. Users logged in via SSO are redirected to the wrong org after the SAML assertion is consumed.

## Rollout plan
Password reset tokens are not being invalidated after a successful reset — they remain valid for 15 minutes.

documents.semantic_id: Design: Hpa Keeps Scaling Up Then Immediately Back Down — The Target Cpu Is Oscillating Around The Threshold

sections.text:
## Overview
The new RBAC role for the oncall group needs get,list,watch on pods and logs across all namespaces. Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start.

## Architecture
NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node. Pod affinity rule is too strict — we want soft-anti-affinity across zones, currently set to hard.

## Data model
CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow. Pod affinity rule is too strict — we want soft-anti-affinity across zones, currently set to hard.

## Rollout plan
StatefulSet volume claim template was changed but existing PVCs aren't being updated — they need to be recreated.

## Overview

Chunk overlap at 20% isn't enough for long-form legal docs; bump to 30% for that tenant. Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries. ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org.

sections.text:
## Overview
Read replica lag hit 12s during the bulk import; we need to batch the writes smaller. Vacuum is lagging on the events table — autovacuum thresholds are too conservative.

## Architecture
The daily snapshot job failed because the backup role lost the SELECT grant on the new partitions. Connection pool exhaustion at peak — pgbouncer is set to 100 but we're seeing 120 concurrent connections. Read replica lag hit 12s during the bulk import; we need to batch the writes smaller.

## Data model
Alembic downgrade path for migration 0038 is broken — it references a column that was renamed in 0041. The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query.

## Rollout plan
Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod.
